msg: Loop start: live activity stream + two new power-tool agents (architect, optimizer)
Dashboard: added the ⚡ Agent activity panel + phase colors
Created architect.md + optimizer.md; wired into loop, AGENT-STANDARDS, optimize-model, README
Headless render PASS: activity panel + all 6 agent cards appear
2-lens blind panel -> revise: attr-XSS on phase, stale README diagram, architect/optimizer overlap, no revert branch
Applied fixes: whitelist phase class, reframe architect(not blind)+optimizer(perf/cost), honest 4+2 diagram, revert-on-failed-reQA, schema docs
Re-QA PASS (XSS-safe, JS parses, 6 agents). Shipped.
Wired /build, /retro, /optimize-model as real .claude/commands slash commands (verified targets exist)
New build: standalone onboarding/customize + lead-capture route for weeknight.dev (Next.js+Supabase). Dispatching architect to map integration + plan.
Scope extended mid-flight: admin insights view (funnel + segment metrics, per-lead answer drill-down). Architect brief updated live.
Plan returned: /get-started concierge page, 10 units, 3 new tables + funnel view, dual persistence, admin insights. Awaiting operator approval.
Approved. Writing U1 (0018_onboarding.sql) + U2 (lib/onboarding taxonomy) as fixed contracts, then fanning out 3 parallel builders.
Contracts done (0018_onboarding.sql + lib/onboarding/{types,segments,questions,presets}.ts). Fanning out 3 parallel builders: page+prefs, capture+notify, presets+admin.
Capture API + notify adapter DONE (tsc clean): fill-once funnel stamps, notify-once on first capture, dual rate buckets, 503 migration hint. A + C still building.
BuilderA DONE (page+quiz+prefs, build green). Parent fixed contract defect A flagged: memberOfferPath added so member pitch copy + route agree. tsc clean. Waiting on BuilderC.
All 3 builders integrated. Fresh next build exit 0 (5 new routes). Parent closed the TODO(U6): page now uses loadPreset (admin overrides live). Dispatching 2-seat blind security/integration panel.

Security seat: REVISE. RLS/XSS/PII core holds; 3 majors on abuse (session-rotation flooding via spoofable XFF, free-text funnel columns -> admin DoS, protocol-relative // redirect in sanitizer) + CR/LF subject + PII retention note. Awaiting integration seat, then one fix pass.

Panel aggregated: 1 blocker (capture promises email nothing sends) + 5 majors + minors. Fixer dispatched with full spec: confirm-email reuse, response.ok gating, trusted-IP + global bucket, field whitelists, clamped funnel math, // sanitizer, utm forwarding.
URGENT pivot: live money bug (charged, no membership). Launching 3-agent auth/purchase/identity investigation tree + finishing onboarding fixes in parallel. Fixer died on session limit at FIX 3a.
Onboarding fix pass COMPLETE (finished by parent after fixer died): all review findings fixed, tsc 0, next build exit 0.

MONEY BUG root-caused: subscriptions keyed by user_id only; duplicate accounts (guest checkout email_confirm:false + no auto-link) orphan the sub; reconcile sweeps orders but NEVER subscriptions -> getActiveSubscription returns null on the account they log into. Password login IS wired but silently fails on unconfirmed emails.

PRIMARY root cause confirmed (investigator A): live Stripe webhook only subscribes checkout.session.completed + charge.refunded; subscriptions row written ONLY by customer.subscription.* handler -> never fires -> charged, no membership. Fix: durable checkout.session.completed subscription fallback + operator adds events + resend. Writing runbook + building.

Auth fixes built: durable webhook subscription fallback + upsert error->500 retry + reconcile subscriptions + signin-password reconcile + email_not_confirmed guards. tsc check next; then blind security review.

Newsletter opt-in interrupt built: /welcome route (only nags never-offered users) + /api/newsletter-optin (single opt-in for signed-in/confirmed users, dodges the spam-confirm gap). Standalone; hookup documented, not forced. Auth security review still running.

Site review: 5 parallel bots (copy/membership/modules-UX/onboarding-prompts/design). Applied safe fixes: design tokens (warm muted, font-mono, tailwind palette), WCAG hero-price contrast, de-AI 9 onboarding pitches + membership tells, 2 onboarding route bugs, hardcoded-42 drift. Big findings documented in SITE-REVIEW.md for operator decision: phantom pricing anchor, fake founding counter in JSON-LD, manual-progress=0%, onboarding NOT wired to generated prompts. tsc+build verified.
FATHOM slice: confirmed stack (Pixi v8+Vite+TS), local-save-first, real-art extraction on pass 1
14 module contracts + 7-wave build order written to contracts/
Pixi v8 nearest-scale/additive/bloom + pngjs extraction facts confirmed
asset pipeline: 82 sprites + 23 anims extracted from 6 sheets
vertical slice built: state/render/input/movement/projectiles/spitter/worldgen/hud/loading/cutscene/save
headless WebGL smoke PASS, 0 errors; found readability blocker (current bloom wash)
REFINE: subtle currents + calm bloom + soft glow texture; re-QA PASS
dispatched blind panel (game-feel + correctness lenses) + playtester
